items.headline: Goaltender Scott Wedgewood rises from career backup to the Avalanche's playoff rock
items.description:
DENVER (AP) — Scott Wedgewood tends to notice just about everything happening around him, no matter the task.
That traffic pattern five lights ahead while driving? He’s already planned for it. The people passing by while he’s walking in the airport or the mall with his family? He’s logged each detail.

items.headline: White Sox place Everson Pereira on IL and recall Jarred Kelenic from Triple-A
items.description:
CHICAGO (AP) — The Chicago White Sox placed outfielder Everson Pereira on the 10-day injured list with a right pectoral strain on Wednesday before their game with the Los Angeles Angels and selected the contract of outfielder Jarred Kelenic from Triple-A Charlotte.
The 25-year-old Pereira left Tuesday night’s game against the Angels with right shoulder soreness after taking an awkward swing during an at-bat in the fourth inning when he struck out swinging. Pereira is batting .250 with three homers and seven RBIs in 18 games this season.

items.headline: Blue Jays activate veteran George Springer off injured list, designate Eloy Jiménez for assignment
items.description:
TORONTO (AP) — The Toronto Blue Jays activated designated hitter George Springer off the 10-day injured list on Wednesday after the four-time All-Star missed 15 games because of a fractured left big toe.
Eloy Jiménez was designated for assignment.

items.headline: Red Sox put Garrett Crochet on 15-day IL with shoulder inflammation and recall Nate Eaton
items.description:
TORONTO (AP) — The Boston Red Sox put left-hander Garrett Crochet on the 15-day injured list Wednesday because of left shoulder inflammation and recalled utilityman Nate Eaton from Triple-A Worcester.
Last year’s AL Cy Young Award runner-up, when he went 18-5 with a 2.59 ERA, Crochet has a 6.30 ERA through six starts in 2026.

items.description: Arsenal winger Bukayo Saka has to make do with a place on the bench for his team's Champions League semi-final clash against Atletico Madrid on Wednesday, with Noni...

items.headline: Liverpool 'expect Salah to be available' before Anfield exit
items.description: Liverpool said on Wednesday that they expected Mohamed Salah to be "available to play again before the end of this season" after injury threatened to disrupt...

items.headline: Broncos' 2-time Pro Bowl safety Justin Simmons retires after 32 interceptions in his 9-year career
items.description:
DENVER (AP) — Two-time Pro Bowl safety Justin Simmons has retired following a nine-year career, including eight seasons with the Denver Broncos.
The Broncos announced Simmons' retirement on Wednesday and noted the news came exactly 10 years after the team selected the safety in the third round from Boston College in 2016.

items.headline: NBA Twyman-Stokes Teammate of the Year
items.description:
2026 — DeAndre Jordan, C, New Orleans Pelicans
2025 — Stephen Curry, G, Golden State Warriors

items.headline: No. 1 Jannik Sinner beats rising star Rafael Jódar in Madrid and declares 'what a player'
items.description:
MADRID (AP) — Top-ranked Jannik Sinner proved too much for Rafael Jódar, the latest tennis sensation from Spain.
Jódar's run was halted by a 6-2, 7-6 (0) loss to Sinner in the quarterfinals of the Madrid Open on Wednesday.

items.headline: Panthers sign fifth-year option on QB Bryce Young's contract, keeping him in Carolina through 2027
items.description:
CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — The Carolina Panthers signed the fifth-year option on quarterback Bryce Young’s rookie contract on Wednesday, keeping the 2023 No. 1 pick with the team through the 2027 season.
General manager Dan Morgan first mentioned on SiriusXM’s “Mad Dog Sports Radio” that he was planning to sign the contract and later confirmed to the The Associated Press that he had signed the deal.
